notes: v1.14.104 - Site Profile re-homed into the New UI (last furniture move). Profile/site-config now opens as a full-height New-UI sheet (#rd-profile-sheet) that renders the REUSED siteProfile_showEditor (all fields + platforms + siteProfile_save persistence reused, NOT rebuilt) - no more showPage('master') bounce. Entry points: a redesign-only 'SITE PROFILE -> EDIT' row added to the SYS status panel (#hdr-agg-panel) [NOTE: the handoff said the SYS pill was unwired - it's actually hdr_aggToggle; left intact, added Profile as a panel row instead], plus firstRun_openProfile() is now redesign-aware so the Command 'Profile' pill + rung-A 'SET UP SITE' reach the same sheet. siteProfile_showEditor's default container is sheet-aware so save/reset re-render into the sheet (not legacy ops-content). showMode() closes the sheet on nav. Frame-safe (sheet sits above the bottom nav). All body.rd-gated; legacy pg-master profile section + SYS panel untouched. Handoff fn names were off (real: siteProfile_load/save/saveFromEditor/showEditor, master_showSection). Follow-up: optional restyle of the editor form fields into IDENTITY/SITE-HARDWARE/CONVENTIONS/MASTER section cards (kept the reused editor to honor re-home-don't-rebuild).
